title: Instagram Public Comment Hunter (High-Recall Beta) Input

username.title: Target username
username.description: Instagram username to investigate. The Actor is comments-first and aims for high recall on public comment traces, including traces left by private accounts on public posts when discoverable. No end-user login is required in the public flow, but real high-recall operation depends on stronger discovery, longer runs, and anti-blocking support behind the scenes.

runMode.title: Run mode
runMode.description: Backfill runs are longer and try to widen recall as much as possible. Freshness runs are lighter and prioritize repeated updates using existing discovery memory.

maxDiscoveryCycles.title: Max discovery cycles
maxDiscoveryCycles.description: How many internal discovery/scan cycles the Actor should attempt before stopping. Higher values favor deeper recall, longer runtime, and higher discovery effort.
